installCommand: git submodule update --init --recursive && npm ci && cd frontend && npm ci && cd ../apps/prompt-anatomy && npm ci
buildCommand: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../apps/prompt-anatomy && VITE_BASE_PATH=/anatomija/ VITE_MVP_MODE=1 npm run build && mkdir -p ../../frontend/dist/anatomija && cp -r dist/* ../../frontend/dist/anatomija/
